channel.title: blog on Jonas B. Skånøy
channel.description: Recent content in blog on Jonas B. Skånøy

item.title: Welcome to the blog
item.description: So, it’s about time for me to start blogging! I’ve been putting off the idea for quite some time now (Just wanted everything else on the site to be in order first), but finally I am doing it. I’ll for the most part make blog posts on things that interested me - that being continental philosophy -, and technologies that takes my attention. I will also be posting updates to the sites here, when that’s necessary.
